message:
TUI: throttle inactive screen ticks and add compose discard confirmation

- Add INACTIVE_SCREEN_TICK_DIVISOR=5 to skip 4 out of every 5 tick
  events on inactive screens, reducing CPU usage when the TUI is
  showing a background screen that doesn't need frequent updates.

- Force an immediate tick when switching screens so the newly active
  screen renders without waiting for the next tick interval.

- Add a confirmation modal when discarding a compose draft — pressing
  Escape in the compose screen now prompts "Discard draft?" instead
  of silently discarding. Add cmd_contains_tick test helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
